prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: full-screen game background plate for a browser railway simulator
Primary request: Create a dense isometric pixel-art / early-2000s railway management simulator world plate showing the Tokaido Shinkansen corridor across central Japan, from Tokyo/Yokohama through Nagoya/Kyoto to Shin-Osaka.
Scene/backdrop: recognizable Japan coastline and bays viewed as an isometric map, with dense city districts, station yards, multiple rail corridors, bridges, rivers, parks, mountains, harbors, small boats, and compact urban blocks.
Subject: high-speed Shinkansen rail corridor, station platforms, overhead power gantries, detailed track beds, city buildings, greenery, water, and terrain details.
Style/medium: crisp 2D pixel-art isometric game screen, A-Train / late-1990s Japanese transport sim / SimCity BuildIt density, hand-painted pixels, readable miniature details, not photorealistic, not low-poly.
Composition/framing: wide landscape game-map view with the rail corridor running left-to-right through the middle third; leave room for DOM HUD panels around edges; no title card; no UI panels inside the image.
Lighting/mood: sunny calm morning, ASMR-soft, gentle contrast, cozy miniature-world atmosphere.
Color palette: saturated but controlled greens, deep ocean blue, warm station lights, neutral concrete, blue-white Shinkansen accents.
Materials/textures: pixelated rooftops, glass windows, concrete viaducts, steel rails, tree canopies, water texture, small roads and bridges.
Text: none.
Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no checkerboard, no floating cutout sprites, no giant trains, no pasted UI. Everything must look like one cohesive game map plate.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game background inset / station-detail art plate
Primary request: Create a dense isometric pixel-art Tokyo Station Shinkansen yard scene for a railway operations ASMR simulator.
Scene/backdrop: central Tokyo station area with many parallel tracks, platforms, arched platform roofs, overhead gantries, nearby city blocks, roads, canals, trees, small buses and cars.
Subject: several detailed white-blue Shinkansen trains parked and departing, station platforms with tiny passenger dots, overhead wires, signals, track switches, and surrounding dense urban buildings.
Style/medium: crisp 2D pixel-art isometric game screen, late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese transport management sim, dense hand-painted sprite detail, polished production asset.
Composition/framing: 16:10 landscape, rail yard diagonally across center, no UI panels, no labels, no text.
Lighting/mood: calm sunny morning, relaxing and orderly, ASMR railway ambience.
Color palette: deep blues, concrete grays, glass teal, warm amber platform lights, green trees.
Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no checkerboard, no UI, no giant trains, cohesive scene only.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: detailed train reference card image for in-game inspector panel
Primary request: Create a detailed isometric pixel-art N700S-inspired Shinkansen train on an elevated track through a Japanese urban neighborhood.
Scene/backdrop: city blocks, trees, concrete viaduct, overhead catenary gantries, small station elements, clean rails.
Subject: white Shinkansen train with blue stripe, detailed segmented cars, windows, nose shape, pantographs, roof panels, subtle highlights. No logos.
Style/medium: crisp isometric pixel-art, late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese transport sim, dense but readable pixels, polished game asset.
Composition/framing: train large enough to show detail, diagonal isometric angle, landscape frame, no UI, no text.
Lighting/mood: calm daylight, cozy ASMR rail ambience.
Constraints: no readable text, no watermark, no logos, no checkerboard, no floating object; make it a cohesive small scene.
